# In Flames Closet - Archive of the band's artworks

> An archive of In Flames artworks throughout the years: clothes, goodies, and more. Explore the
> history of the band through their official merchandise and products, from their Gothenburg roots
> in the early 1990s all the way to today.

The closet is a searchable web app. Visitors can filter artworks by title, category (t-shirts,
hoodies, and other goodies), linked album/release, and year, then sort chronologically. It is a
non-commercial fan project; all artworks and trademarks belong to their respective owners.

## Key facts

- Artist: In Flames (melodic death metal, formed 1990 in Gothenburg, Sweden)
- Catalogued: official clothing, goodies, and artworks across the decades
- Data per item: title, category, linked album/release, year, official status, and source
- Curated by: A Jester's Collection (https://jesterscollection.kiriancaumes.fr/)

## Links

- Closet homepage: https://in-flames-closet.kiriancaumes.fr/
- Curator's collection: https://jesterscollection.kiriancaumes.fr/
- Source code: https://github.com/KirianCaumes/In-Flames-Closet

## Contributing

Corrections and new item suggestions can be sent to ajesterscollection@gmail.com.
